records.ety: [LL. disparitas, fr. L. dispar unlike, unequal; dis- + par equal: cf. F. disparit. See Par, Peer.]

defs: Inequality; difference in age, rank, condition, or excellence; dissimilitude; -- followed by between, in, of, as to, etc.; as, disparity in, or of, years; a disparity as to color.
quotes: The disparity between God and his intelligent creatures.
The disparity of numbers was not such as ought to cause any uneasiness.
